synthetic_demo.description: Generated daily panel demand with trend, weekly seasonality, noise, and shocks.

uci_bike_sharing_day.description: Daily bike rental count from the UCI Bike Sharing dataset.
uci_bike_sharing_day.citation: Fanaee-T, H. (2013). Bike Sharing [Dataset]. UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C5W894

uci_online_retail.description: Product-level daily demand from the UCI Online Retail transaction table.
uci_online_retail.citation: Chen, D. (2015). Online Retail [Dataset]. UCI Machine Learning Repository. https://doi.org/10.24432/C5BW33
